MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Shuet Yi Ng in pro per, Appellant/Defendant

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. Stipulation to pro tem judge signed. The parties were sworn and both sides presented oral and documentary evidence to the court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter was taken under submission.
